news.t: How bond experts recommend positioning for lower interest rates
New ETF looks to profit from municipal bonds

overview.description: The BondBloxx IR+M Tax-Aware Short Duration ETF (TAXX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is actively managed, seeking attractive after-tax income while preserving capital through investments in USD-denominated municipal and taxable short-duration fixed income securities. TAXX was launched on Mar 14, 2024 and is issued by BondBloxx.

data.title: How bond experts recommend positioning for lower interest rates
data.text: With the Federal Reserve signaling it could cut rates as soon as September, investors may want to start adjusting their fixed income strategies now.

data.title: Money markets, mortgages & active management: New nuances of the bond market
data.text: Money markets, mortgages & active management: New nuances of the bond market.

data.title: New ETF looks to profit from municipal bonds
data.text: BondBloxx aims to maximize after-tax returns with its new ETF, the IR+M Tax-Aware Short Duration ETF (TAXX).

data.title: Bonds 2.0: new strategies for taxes, floating rates and more
data.text: Bonds 2.0: new strategies for taxes, floating rates and more.
